mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (category_id, name, slug, subtitle, description, short_desc, purity, form_type, storage, specification, price, stock_status, is_featured, image, sort_order, name_zh, subtitle_zh, short_desc_zh, description_zh, purity_zh, form_zh, storage_zh, specification_zh, name_es, subtitle_es, short_desc_es, description_es, purity_es, form_es, storage_es, specification_es) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{subtitle}, #{description}, #{shortDesc}, #{purity}, #{form}, #{storage}, #{specification}, #{price}, #{stockStatus}, #{isFeatured}, #{coverImage}, #{sortOrder}, #{nameZh}, #{subtitleZh}, #{shortDescZh}, #{descriptionZh}, #{purityZh}, #{formZh}, #{storageZh}, #{specificationZh}, #{nameEs}, #{subtitleEs}, #{shortDescEs}, #{descriptionEs}, #{purityEs}, #{formEs}, #{storageEs}, #{specificationEs})
